semantic.role: Public API facade (barrel export) for the infrastructure subsystem, aggregating and re-exporting all infra-layer modules.
responsibilities: Centralizes and exposes the public contract of the infrastructure layer to other subsystems
Provides a single import point for consumers needing infra services (config, documents, languages, manifest, rules, versions)
outOfScope: Does not contain any business logic or implementation details
Does not define or enforce any architectural rules itself
invariants: All re-exported modules must exist and be valid TypeScript modules
The barrel export must not introduce circular dependencies

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a clean, centralized public API surface for the infrastructure layer, enabling other subsystems to import infra services without coupling to internal module paths.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No changes detected in this file; the recent refactor (c4ed85e) likely established this facade pattern as part of subsystem boundary enforcement.

English.role: Public API facade (barrel export) for the infrastructure subsystem, aggregating and re-exporting all infra-layer modules.

outOfScope: Does not contain any business logic or implementation details

Simplified Chinese.role: 基础设施子系统的公共 API 外观（桶导出），聚合并重新导出所有基础设施层模块。
responsibilities: 集中并暴露基础设施层的公共契约给其他子系统
为需要基础设施服务（配置、文档、语言、清单、规则、版本）的消费者提供单一导入点
outOfScope: 不包含任何业务逻辑或实现细节
本身不定义或强制执行任何架构规则
